comment: The "Albums" feature is difficult and tedious to use, and I can't figure how to make a folder. Also, it's pretty strange and inconvenient that you need wi-fi to access your photos and look at them. However, I like the "Stylized Photo" and "Animation Features," those bump it up a star. Overall, this app needs some huge improvements.
the function of activity: This activity allows users to navigate to library/memories/search, cast content, back up photos, favorite items, and access various editing and sharing options.
the sub-task list of state: [{'name': 'Merory Page', 'description': 'Access memory page.'}, {'name': 'Search', 'description': 'Search for specific photos or albums using keywords or filters'}, {'name': 'Create', 'description': 'Create new albums or collages with selected photos'}, {'name': 'Share', 'description': 'Share photos or albums with contacts or on social media platforms'}, {'name': 'Settings', 'description': 'Adjust app settings such as photo quality, storage location, or account information'}, {'name': 'View All', 'description': 'View all photos or albums in a comprehensive grid layout'}]
